---
title: "Therapeutic Drug Monitoring Tools"
description: |
  Therapeutic Drug Monitoring (TDM) tools are web-based platforms that assist clinicians in optimizing precision dosing for improved patient outcomes. 
  
  **Note:** At present, these tools support high-dose methotrexate (HD-MTX) and infliximab (IFX), with further applications currently in development.

output:
  distill::distill_article:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    edit: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

<div style="color:#8B0000; border:1px solid #8B0000; padding:10px; border-radius:5px;">
<strong>Disclaimer:</strong> These predictions are estimates and may not accurately 
reflect your patient population or individual patient circumstances. This tool is 
not a substitute for clinical judgment, institutional protocols, or standards of care. 
The user assumes full responsibility for all dosing decisions and use of this tool.</div>


## High-Dose Methotrexate (HD-MTX)

[HD-MTX TDM tool](https://019ddfa9-9cb7-fc11-0955-cc8f94d87446.share.connect.posit.cloud/)

## Infliximab (IFX)

[IFX tool](https://connect.posit.cloud/leena-choi/content/019df8e8-afe7-6ea5-b251-870a07339d27)
